cards.title: Panchakarma Therapies
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • Abhyanga: Full body oil massage (60 min)
  • Shirodhara: Warm oil on forehead, 30–40 min
  • Pinda Sweda (Navara Kizhi): Medicated rice bolus
  • Kati Basti: Warm oil pool on lumbar region
  • Neti (Jala & Sutra): Nasal cleansing protocols
